invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破3170（基于ATR 17.9218和近期支撑调整，原为3150）或融资费率Z-Score超过100%（显示进一步拥挤），则失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 3170 (adjusted from 3150 based on ATR 17.9218 and recent support) or funding rate Z-Score exceeds 100% (indicating further crowding).

invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破125（基于ATR和近期低点）或融资费率Z-Score超过80%（显示过度拥挤多头），则失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 125 (based on ATR and recent lows) or funding rate Z-Score exceeds 80% (indicating overly crowded longs).
